rationale: Acting on Review 2 would produce only trivial refactors (replacing one simpa+have, condensing an explicit 4-step rw into simp, and restating the involution lemma as ^2=1 to drop one rw[pow_two]) whose only effect is cosmetic; both forms and styles satisfy proof-quality equally well and no maintainer would block over them. Review 1's clean approve is therefore equivalent.
